text-muted.$description: Muted meta text. Darkened from #737373 so it clears WCAG AA 4.5:1 on the off-white surfaces it sits on (--uix-bg-subtle #F5F5F5, --uix-bg-app #FAFAFA); the old value was 4.34:1 on #F5F5F5.

accent.$description: Runtime: chains through the write-only --uix-brand slot. Must stay var() to keep live brand override.

accent-hover.$description: Primary-button hover. Theme-aware: derived from the live accent so it tracks the brand override (light darkens, dark lightens — see tokens/dark).

brand-muted.$description: Runtime: color-mix of the live accent.

warning-text.$description: Warning-toned TEXT, legible on the faint --uix-warning-bg in light mode — the bright --uix-warning (#F99C00) fails contrast on pale yellow, so the foreground is a hand-darkened amber. Dark mode overrides to track --uix-warning. Used by status-pill --warning.

info-text.$description: Info-toned TEXT, legible on --uix-info-bg and dark surfaces. Light = --uix-info (already AA on the pale tint); dark brightens it (the deep --uix-info #2563EB fails as text on the dark tint). Used by status-pill/alert/node --info. See --uix-warning-text for the same TEXT-vs-SOLID split.

danger-text.$description: Danger-toned TEXT, legible on --uix-danger-bg (the bright --uix-danger #E40014 is only 4.05:1 on #FFE4E6). A hand-darkened red for text; --uix-danger stays the SOLID role (danger button bg, critical pill, dots). Dark mode brightens it. Used by pill/alert/stat-trend/field-error/menu/sla/node/audit --danger.

amber.$description: SEV-3 / medium-severity tone — the third tier of the severity ramp (danger = SEV-1, warning = SEV-2, amber = SEV-3). A muted ochre, deliberately distinct from the brighter --uix-warning so the three tiers read apart.

amber-text.$description: Amber-toned TEXT, legible on a faint amber tint and on dark surfaces (the SEV-3 ochre is too light as text on pale fills). Dark mode brightens it to track --uix-amber. Used by severity-3 badges.

amber-bg.$description: Amber-toned wash for SEV-3 pill backgrounds. Completes the amber ramp (amber / amber-text / amber-bg) to match the depth of the warning/danger/info ramps.

attention.$description: Time-pressure semantic — 'approaching deadline / SLA at risk'. Distinct from --uix-warning (validation-warning, golden #F99C00) and --uix-danger (error/severity). Covers SLA, renewal-due, EoL/EoS countdown, patch-overdue across modules.

attention-text.$description: Attention-toned TEXT legible on --uix-attention-bg (#FFEDD5). Dark mode brightens to track --uix-attention.

attention-solid.$description: SOLID role for attention fills/dots/pulses (see success-solid).

overdue.$description: Time-pressure semantic — 'breached / past due'. Same hue family as danger but a SEPARATE role so products retheme breach independently of validation error. Covers SLA breach and hard-deadline misses.

overdue-text.$description: Overdue-toned TEXT legible on --uix-overdue-bg (#FEE2E2). Dark mode brightens.

overdue-solid.$description: SOLID role for overdue fills/dots (see success-solid).

sev-4.$description: SEV-4 alias → info tone. Full severity ramp: SEV-1=danger, SEV-2=warning, SEV-3=amber, SEV-4=info, SEV-5=neutral. var() reference — no dark override needed.

sev-5.$description: SEV-5 alias → neutral/muted tone. Lowest priority, minimal visual weight. var() reference — no dark override needed.

success-solid.$description: SOLID status role — the vivid fill/dot/pulse color, distinct from the legible TEXT role (--uix-success). Products override per brand.

row-selected-bg.$description: Dedicated row-selection background (table tr[aria-selected]). Distinct from --uix-row-pinned-bg (#F4F7FF, very pale blue) and --uix-brand-muted (dynamic accent tint). Enables bulk-selected rows to read apart from pinned rows and inbox unread tints in the same table.

scrim.$description: Backdrop behind modal / drawer / side-peek overlays and the avatar edit-overlay — dims the content beneath. Theme-invariant: a black scrim reads on light and dark alike (no dark override).

scrim-strong.$description: Heavier scrim for media-focus surfaces (lightbox), where the backdrop should recede fully behind the image.
